executive_summary: This week surfaces two immediately relevant opportunities: Hyperswitch for payments orchestration could reduce processor dependency at Redpin, and OpenBB's options data APIs directly address NIFTY workflow needs. The trading platforms (StockSharp, vnpy) are mature but require significant integration effort—evaluate only if expanding algorithmic capabilities. AI tooling (OpenClaude, CC Switch) is developer convenience, not COO priority.
